open_conditions_carried_forward: ADR-0010 geo-DS conditions C1–C8 (docs/methodology/ADR-0010-geo-signoff.md) → discharge in docs/methodology/spatial-methods.md under R-C1 before any R-A6/R-A9 model merges. Key: distance-weighting must COMPOSE WITH (not replace) the OSM completeness-bias correction (ADR-0008 §5).

Clean-architecture tidy: make analysis/ layer read via a CONFIGURABLE DuckDB connection (drop hard-coded data/gentriduck.duckdb at analysis/e1_regressions.py:48) so Layer 3 isn't local-only. Noted in ADR-0010 amendment 7; do when R-A6 lands.
next_session_decision: Maintainer to pick the next BUILD task (deferred to next session). Standing recommendation: #65 (E1/E2 re-run). Alternatives: #69 R-A6 SQL distance-weighting (zero new deps), #71, #78.
